reference: I have a sore or small ulcer on the right underside of my tongue. It has a small white spot. Also, about a month ago, I had a cold sore in the right corner of my mouth, which appears to be gone. What is the best way to treat this? I am currently taking Daktarin, which appears to lessen the soreness that was not very strong.
text: If you want to talk to someone, grab a phonebook or whatever.
